result.summary: Found 5 issues on the BetRivers PA casino page, ranging from content clipping to truncated navigation labels and partially obscured game cards.

issues.description: The top navigation tab 'Hot Games' is visually cut off, displaying only 'Hot Ga...' without an ellipsis or tooltip, making it unclear what the tab label is.
issues.suggestion: Ensure navigation tab labels either truncate gracefully with ellipsis or the tab bar scrolls with proper affordance indicators so full labels are accessible.

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge of both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially clipped (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUN...MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...'). The truncated titles make them unreadable and unrecognizable.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll affordance such as a gradient fade-out overlay or a scroll arrow to communicate horizontal scrollability, and ensure at least a readable portion of each card is visible.

issues.description: There is no visible horizontal scrollbar or scroll indicator for the game carousels, leaving it unclear to users that horizontal scrolling is available to see more games.
issues.suggestion: Add a subtle scrollbar, arrow buttons, or a fade/gradient on the right edge to indicate that more content is available by scrolling horizontally.

issues.description: The partially visible game thumbnails on the right side of each row (e.g., the third column) appear interactable but are difficult to tap or click reliably due to being cut off at the screen edge.
issues.suggestion: Ensure partially visible cards still have a sufficient tap/click target area, or reflow the grid so cards are either fully visible or clearly outside the viewport.

issues.description: The jackpot amount displayed on 'Cop the Lot' ($6,264.35) and '3 Fiend Pots' ($13,015.06) use a small white font that has low contrast against some game thumbnail backgrounds, potentially reducing legibility.
issues.suggestion: Add a semi-transparent dark overlay or a text shadow behind jackpot amount labels to ensure sufficient contrast across all thumbnail backgrounds.
